title: Arenaria cavanillesiana
taxonomy: Arenaria cavanillesiana is classified within the plant kingdom as a species of flowering plant. It belongs to the family Caryophyllaceae, commonly known as the pink or carnation family. This classification is based on its morphological and anatomical characteristics, as well as its genetic makeup. Arenaria cavanillesiana is further classified into the genus Arenaria, which comprises approximately 70 species of annual and perennial plants. The exact classification may vary depending on the source and any recent revisions to the plant's taxonomy.
